nasb.text: and will throw them into the furnace of fire; in that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.

esv.text: and throw them into the fiery furnace. In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.

cnv.text: 丟進火爐，在那裡必要哀哭切齒。

ccb.text: 丢在火炉里，让恶人在那里哀哭切齿。

csbs.text: 丢进火炉里。在那里将有哀哭和切齿。”
